mapper.sql: A.CNTNTS_ID AS cntntsId , A.CNTNTS_NM AS cntntsNm , A.CNTC_URL AS cntcUrl , A.CNTNTS_USE_AT AS cntntsUseAt , A.CNTNTS_LINK_URL AS cntntsLinkUrl , A.CNTNTS_DC AS cntntsDc
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_INDVDL_PGE_CNTNTS A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.CNTNTS_ID DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_INDVDL_PGE_CNTNTS A WHERE 1=1
